Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractArrayVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleArrayValidator<V,​A,​E>,​A,​E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V,​A>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractArrayVerifier<S,​V,​A,​E>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
V - the type of validator used by the verifier
A - the type of the array
E - the type of elements in the array
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleArrayVerifier<S,​A,​E>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​A>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArrayVerifierImpl
public abstract class AbstractArrayVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleArrayValidator<V,​A,​E>,​A,​E>
extends AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V,​A>
implements ExtensibleArrayVerifier<S,​A,​E>
An implementation of ExtensibleArrayVerifier.
